message.reasoning_content:
We need to produce stage 5: web-005-nested-shared-table. Goal: Create webpage 5 and add a shared nested table or shared data section that all five pages use consistently. Validators: - shared-table-all-pages: failure_class=shared_state - all-pages-linked: failure_class=link_integrity We have existing files: index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, page-4.html, all with shared navigation (as per stage 4). Now we need to add page-5.html and also a shared nested table or shared data section that all five pages use consistently. Interpretation: We need to create a shared component (maybe an HTML snippet) that is included in each page. Since we cannot use server-side includes, we can embed the same table HTML in each page's body. The validator likely checks that each page contains the same nested table structure (maybe with same id or class). So we need to add a nested table (a table within a table) to each page (including page-5). The shared table should be consistent across all pages. Thus we need to modify existing pages (index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, page-4.html) to include the nested table. Also create page-5.html with same navigation and nested table. We must ensure all pages still have navigation linking to all pages (1-5). The existing navigation includes links to page-5? Not yet. We need to update navigation to include page-5 across all pages. Thus modifications: - site/index.html: nav currently includes Home, page-2, page-3, page-4. Need to add link to page-5.html. Also need to embed nested table somewhere, maybe after main content or within main. - site/page-2.html: nav includes Home, page-3, page-4. Need to add page-5 link, maybe also page-1? Already Home. Also need nested table. - site/page-3.html: nav includes Home, page-2, page-4. Add page-5. - site/page-4.html: nav includes Home, page-2, page-3. Add page-5. - site/page-5.html: new file with nav linking to all pages (1-5). Include nested table. Define nested table: For example:
Nested Cell 1
Nested Cell 2
Or a more elaborate but consistent. Add this after main content maybe before closing body. We need to ensure HTML valid. Thus we will produce JSON with files: site/index.html, site/page-2.html, site/page-3.html, site/page-4.html, site/page-5.html. All need to have same nested table. Also need to ensure navigation includes all pages: index.html (Home), page-2.html, page-3.html, page-4.html, page-5.html. For other pages, navigation should include Home (index.html), page-2, page-3, page-4, page-5. For page-2, maybe also include link to page-2 itself? Not needed. But include all pages. Thus nav for each page:
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4 Page 5
Even on index.html, include link to itself (Home). That's okay. Now nested table: We'll embed after main content, maybe before closing body. Add:
